auth.otpSent: Ikhodi ithunyelwe ku-{{phone}}. Ngesikhathi sokuthuthukisa, sebenzisa 000000.
auth.invalidPhone: Sicela ufake inombolo yocingo eválid yaseNingizimu Afrika (+27 noma 0 ulandele amanani ayisishiyagalolunye).
auth.errorNetwork: Iphutha lenethiwekhi. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumana kwakho bese uzame futhi.
auth.errorUnknown: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.

kyc.title: Ukuqinisekisa Ubunikazi
kyc.body: Ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi kuzotholakala maduze. Ungaqhubeka ukuhlola i-QuroVita phakathi nalesi sikhathi.

home.title: Amarekhodi Ami Ezempilo
home.noRecords: Awekho amarekhodi ezempilo okwamanje. Amarekhodi ayabelanwe nawe yi-clinic azovela lapha.

share.title: Yabelana Ngamarekhodi
share.body: Khetha amarekhodi ofuna ukuwabelana nawo, bese uchofa Yabelana ukuze udale ikhodi ye-QR ephephile ye-clinic.

assistant.title: Umsizi Wezempilo
assistant.disclaimer: Lo msizi uhlinzeka ngolwazi lwezempilo olujwayelekile kuphela. Ngeke akwazi ukuhumusha imiphumela yakho yezivivinyo noma akunike iseluleko sezokwelapha. Hlala uxhumana no-healthcare provider wakho.
assistant.blockedMessage: Angikwazi ukuphendula lowo mbuzo othile mayelana nemiphumela yakho, kodwa ngingachaza imibono jikelele yezempilo noma ngikhombe imibuzo ozoyibuza udokotela wakho.
assistant.errorNetwork: Iphutha lenethiwekhi. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumana kwakho.
assistant.errorUnknown: Ayikwazanga ukuthola impendulo. Sicela uzame futhi.
